skill.name: code-review-architecture
skill.description: Architecture-focused review lens for assessing coupling, module boundaries, abstraction quality, and rollback-safe design during code review. Use when reviewing design quality, separation of concerns, transaction boundaries, or structural maintainability.
skill.author: Agent Skills Team

name: code-review-architecture
description: Architecture review lens for design quality, coupling, cohesion, module boundaries, and rollback-safe side effects.

categories.name: Coupling & Cohesion
categories.description: Tight coupling, low cohesion, circular dependencies, dependency inversion issues

categories.name: Separation of Concerns
categories.description: Business logic placement, layering, and single-responsibility boundaries

categories.name: Abstraction & Interfaces
categories.description: Abstraction levels, interface quality, and leaky boundaries

categories.name: Module Boundaries
categories.description: API contracts, visibility, and boundary enforcement

categories.name: Design Patterns
categories.description: Appropriate pattern use, anti-patterns, and consistency

categories.name: Data Flow
categories.description: Clear data movement, state handling, and persistence separation

categories.name: Extensibility & Maintainability
categories.description: Configurability, duplication, and future change safety

categories.name: Transaction Boundary Invariants
categories.description: Transactional writes versus external side effects and lifecycle-hook safety
